title: RandomizerMadness
description: With this plugin, block and mob drops can become completely random items!
body:
![Example of the randomizer plugin in action](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5537fbf942d0cb2d106b28ccdf77c10f4f7cab2.png)

# RandomizerMadness!
RandomizerMadness is a fun plugin for Minecraft 1.21 ( and hopefully older versions and newer ones to come ) which adds some spice to your server!

## Installation
Don't worry, the installation process is extremely easy!
1. Download the plugin and place in your server's plugin folder
2. Ensure that your machine has **Java 22** installed since the plugin is compiled in this version.
3. When the server is run, a new folder will be made in your plugins folder called RandomizerMadness. This contains the **config.yml** file which you can use to enable and disable certain aspects of the plugin.
4. That's it!

## Commands and Permissions
### Commands
There are 2 commands:
/randommobs <true/false> - if true then randomized mob drops are enabled, if false then they are disabled.
/randomblocks <true/false> - if true then randomized block drops are enabled, if false then they are disabled.

### Permissions
There are 2 permissions:
rm.randommobs - allows the user to use the /randommobs command
rm.randomblocks - allows the user to use the /randomblocks command
Both of these permissions are automatically given to any player who is op on the server.

## Issues
Please use the [issues tracker](https://github.com/RascallyFern818/RandomizerMadness/issues) on github to report any issues, thanks!
